title: Customer Stories | Vervoe
text:
Customer Stories | Vervoe

Vervoe helps businesses hire top performers · How Dentsu is using Vervoe to create realistic job previews · Case Studies · How the AFL Built a Scalable, Skills-Based Hiring Process in Under Two Weeks · Shaping the Future of Talent: How Findex Went Skills-First in Graduate Hiring · N5Now Transforms Recruitment with Customized Spanish Assessments from Vervoe · How ConnectCPA Turns Hiring Potential Into Insight with Vervoe · How Team Global Express Cut Hiring Time in Half and Boosted Diversity with Vervoe · How Bank Of Queensland Transformed Their Recruitment In 60 Days (With Vervoe) · How Vervoe Elevated Quality Of Hires For 1-800 Contacts · How Consensys Is Using Vervoe To Identify And Attract Highly Skilled Talent · How Certsy Uses Vervoe To Verify Skills Attained On-the-Job · How Dentsu Is Using Vervoe To Create Realistic Job Previews · How Merkle Is Using Vervoe To Cut Through Competition For Highly-Skilled Candidates · How We Opened the Top of Our Hiring Funnel – And Got Better Hires · Hear what our customers have to say · See Vervoe in action

CUSTOMER STORIESVervoe helps businesses hire top performersSee how teams use Vervoe to assess real skills, move faster, and build high-performing teams.FEATURED STORYHow Dentsu is using Vervoe to create realistic job previews“I'm not aware of a comparable competitor to Vervoe … at the moment, I don't think it's actually possible to do what Vervoe does any other way.”Read Customer StoryWatch the videoCase StudiesHow the AFL Built a Scalable, Skills-Based Hiring Process in Under Two Weeks"Having a tool like [Vervoe], ensuring that we are fair and equitable across our process is really important to our team... had we not have used Vervoe this ye…Shaping the Future of Talent: How Findex Went Skills-First in Graduate Hiring"Vervoe enables us to assess candidates at scale through job-relevant, skills-based assessments. It helps us identify top talent faster, reduce time-to-hire, i…N5Now Transforms Recruitment with Customized Spanish Assessments from Vervoe"Vervoe offers a wide range of options for conducting evaluations, making the process faster and easier,"How ConnectCPA Turns Hiring Potential Into Insight with Vervoe"Vervoe has transformed the way we hire, making our process more efficient and insightful. It's a must-have tool for any forward-thinking company."How Team Global Express Cut Hiring Time in Half and Boosted Diversity with Vervoe"We're seeing a huge improvement in candidate quality and a reduction in the recruitment timeline."How Bank Of Queensland Transformed Their Recruitment In 60 Days (With Vervoe)“There’s 100% trust that Vervoe is bringing in the right candidates which means they feel confident that anyone coming to the assessment centre will be hired.”How Vervoe Elevated Quality Of Hires For 1-800 Contacts “I really have enjoyed seeing the results Vervoe has provided. While we have only been using the assessments for a few months, it has helped us to narrow and f…How Consensys Is Using Vervoe To Identify And Attract Highly Skilled Talent "We wanted the ability to identify highly-skilled candidates, and we did that – but we’ve also seen an enormous ROI on the streamlined recruitment process alon…How Certsy Uses Vervoe To Verify Skills Attained On-the-JobHow the Vervoe is powering Certsy's skills verification platform to make it easier for candidates to certify skills they've learned on the job.How Dentsu Is Using Vervoe To Create Realistic Job PreviewsHow Dentsu is using Vervoe for entry-level roles to create realistic job previews, reduce bias in candidate selection, and improve retention.How Merkle Is Using Vervoe To Cut Through Competition For Highly-Skilled CandidatesWith the help of Vervoe’s AI-graded platform, Merkle now has the right recruitment tools to hire more efficiently and source highly-skilled candidates.How We Opened the Top of Our Hiring Funnel – And Got Better HiresLearn how TriNet one of the largest PEO's in the industry uses Vervoe's assessments to help eliminate bias at scale.Hear what our customers have to say5/5“Love the software, use it for hiring all the time”The ability to share automated interview links. All I need to do is set up the interview process/questions and JDs and share the link across my social channels and groups. I get applications and interview results right in my inbox. Saves so much time.Adi S.Founder and CGOG25/5“Our hiring process has improved significantly!”Vervoe enables us to evaluate whether someone can actually do the job before we hire them. It’s far more effective and all of the hires through Vervoe have been far more capable from the get-go.Will E.Portfolio Coach / MentorCapterra5/5“Easy way to pre-screen applicants”I appreciate the flexibility to create a wide range of questions. The ability to create a spreadsheet and have applicants modify it is key for us.Vanessa R.PresidentGetApp4/5“Vervoe Makes Recruiting Much Less Difficult”I love the UI/UX for this platform. Its ease of use and great aesthetic make it a pleasure to work with. Its layout and functionality are pretty intuitive, which is a great thing for software that is supposed to make your life easier - which Vervoe definitely does.Justin A.Digital StrategySoftware Advice5/5“I've become a Vervoe evangelist”I’d been looking for several years for a low-cost, intelligent, online, capability-testing platform that I could customise to address the specific needs of our roles. When presented with Vervoe it was immediately apparent it was the platform I’d been looking for - and it was extremely easy to implement.Daniel S.Talent LeadG25/5“The UI is superb and the interview flow is assured”Streamlined interview processing of potential outsourced staff makes this whole process a breeze. When interviewing for a position on my staff, I have to outsource to many countries throughout the world - different time zones and languages can make this very time-consuming. Anything that can make this less stressful wins my vote.Nigel A.Chief Executive OfficerCapterra4.5/5Read G2 Reviews4.5/5Read Capterra Reviews4.5/5Read GetApp Reviews4.5/5Read ReviewsSee Vervoe in actionRequest a demo to learn how you can assess candidates by performance, not just resumes.Talk to an ExpertCUSTOMER STORIESVervoe helps businesses hire top performersSee how teams use Vervoe to assess real skills, move faster, and build high-performing teams.FEATURED STORYHow Dentsu is using Vervoe to create realistic job previews“I'm not aware of a comparable competitor to Vervoe … at the moment, I don't think it's actually possible to do what Vervoe does any other way.”Read Customer StoryWatch the videoCase StudiesHow the AFL Built a Scalable, Skills-Based Hiring Process in Under Two Weeks"Having a tool like [Vervoe], ensuring that we are fair and equitable across our process is really important to our team... had we not have used Vervoe this ye…Shaping the Future of Talent: How Findex Went Skills-First in Graduate Hiring"Vervoe enables us to assess candidates at scale through job-relevant, skills-based assessments.
